app.title: Love Talk — Conversation Cards
app.subtitle: Start with one card and move a little closer.

home.title: Choose the theme for tonight
home.description: Pick the relationship theme that fits your mood tonight.
home.intimateModeHint: Add 5 prompts that go deeper into closeness and desire.
home.startHint: Tap any theme card to begin; the adult intimacy theme asks for confirmation first.

preview.adultHint: This theme includes adult physical intimacy, sexual needs, consent, and body boundaries. You will be asked to confirm before entering.

attraction.name: Attraction & Sparks
attraction.description: Return to the earliest moments of excitement.

self.name: Self & Exploration
self.description: Know yourself better and let your partner see you.

interaction.name: Interaction & Understanding
interaction.description: Make your communication patterns easier to understand.

trust.name: Trust & Growth
trust.description: Talk about trust, the future, and growing together.

desire.name: Desire & Physical Intimacy
desire.description: For adult partners to talk gently about body boundaries, intimacy invitations, sexual needs, consent, and safety.

values.name: Values & Future
values.description: From core values, money, and family to life direction, long distance, where you stand, and social boundaries—see how well you fit in the choices of everyday life.

orientation.title: Please rotate your phone back to portrait
orientation.description: For the best experience, play in portrait orientation.

end.title: This round is complete
end.cta: Go back home and pick another theme to continue.

modal.leaveTitle: Are you sure you want to leave?
modal.leaveDescription: If you leave now, the progress of this round will be cleared.

adult.title: Adult Intimacy Theme
adult.body: This deck discusses adult physical intimacy, sexual needs, touch preferences, consent, and boundaries. You can say no, pause, or go back at any time; continue only when both of you want to.
adult.ageConfirm: I am 18 or older and understand this theme contains adult intimacy content.
